mapper.delete: delete from interesttb where user_id=#{userId} and acco_no=#{accoNo};
mapper.select: select count(*) from interesttb where user_id=#{userId} and acco_no=#{accoNo};

select i.interest_no as interestNo, i.user_id as userId, a.acco_no as accoNo, a.name, a.addr, min(p.original_name) as imageUrl from interesttb i join accotb a on i.acco_no = a.acco_no left join acco_phototb p on a.acco_no = p.acco_no where i.user_id = #{userId} group by i.interest_no, i.user_id, a.acco_no, a.name, a.addr
